title: Disassembly_Required (murder drones)
description: Simple mod that adds elements from Murder Drones!
body:
**This mod is still in development, changes may occur at any time!**
**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB!**
**Disassembly_Required is not affiliated with glitch productions**

Disassembly_Required adds new entities, biomes, and items based on Murder Drones! You can fight and tame worker drones and disassembly drones, find sentinels, have a baby drone in your house to stare at you.. fight a robot girl demon? I mean you dont HAVE to do that, its up to you! 
If making robot friends isnt your thing, you can put on a cabin fever necklace and be plagued by absolutesolver! fun.. 

list on what the mod has to offer!

- 26 worker drone varients to encounter
- 24 disassembly drone varients
- anti-drone sentinels
- baby worker drones

- Tundra wastes
- Solver wastes
- Bloodhole

- Edible drone cores
- Worker drone limbs to rebuild drones
- Disassembly drones swords, guns, claws, wings, eyes, and EMP
- Rusty knife
- Uzis Railgun
- Bluesteel ore/tools
- Custom swords themed around N and Uzi (Acidic and Oozing swords)
- 10 colors of solver wings

FAQ/Guide
- "How do i tame drones?"
You right click on worker drones with bottles of oil, and hit disassembly drones with an EMP before doing the same
- "What does Absolutesolver do?"
It allows you to use telekenisis, create NULL singularities, fly, and create projectiles
- "How do i get oil, aside from killing drones"
 You can find oil pools in Bloodholes, right click on them with an empty glass bottle to collect it
- "What are the keybinds?"
When having the absolutesolver, press G to turn a worker core in your main hand into a NULL singularity, If you are wearing disassembly drone eyes and wings, G opens the weapon selection menu. Press N with disassembly drone armor to use nanite acid. Press C with absolutesolver to use telekinesis, and R to summon a solver projectile.
- "I tamed a drone but it isnt following me"
 Right click on the drone with a follow USB
